title: Firemen’s Retirement System of St. Louis v. Sorenson (2021) — Delaware Chancery (Marriott / Starwood)

timeline.event: Chancery opinion on derivative claims relating to Starwood breach and oversight (see opinion)

primary_sources.label: Delaware Court of Chancery opinion (Download.aspx id=325170)

evidence_artifacts: M&A cybersecurity diligence files and post-close integration records
Board minutes and committee materials on cyber risk (privileged review)
Breach investigation timeline shared with the board
engineering_takeaways: Cyber diligence in M&A must feed post-close control integration and disclosure readiness.
Board materials should reflect meaningful security risk discussion—not generic risk factors alone.
